chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 89 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.386/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 11-09-2025 Mr. Wajid H. Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
